rows.label: tlk45420144_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Vandham always manages to find
the most interesting individuals
to bring back here, doesn't he?

rows.label: tlk45420144_01_msg0002
rows.name:
I never thought the Holy Grail
would be such a cute girl! I mean,
not that that's a bad thing.

rows.label: tlk45420144_01_msg0003
